title: Network Security, Attacks, Segmentation, and Hardening · Packet Forensics
summary: Threat-model and harden enterprise, guest, IoT, OT, management, and remote-access network zones. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a defense-in-depth network security plan and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish confidentiality, integrity, availability, risk, threat, vulnerability, exploit, likelihood, and impact.
Protect data in transit and at rest and explain certificates, PKI trust, self-signed limits, key management, and rotation.
Use MFA, SSO, RADIUS, LDAP, SAML, TACACS+, time-based authentication, authorization, RBAC, and least privilege appropriately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record
steps.instruction:
Use a changed debug case derived from this module: network security. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Net Cia Risk Terms trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish confidentiality, integrity, availability, risk, threat, vulnerability, exploit, likelihood, and impact.

content.text: For Net Cia Risk Terms, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Net Cia Risk Terms precondition or invariant that the debug case must preserve.
Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed debug case derived from this module: network security. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A vulnerability is the same thing as an active attacker exploiting it.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed debug case derived from this module: network security. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A vulnerability is the same thing as an active attacker exploiting it.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish confidentiality, integrity, availability, risk, threat, vulnerability, exploit, likelihood, and impact. Artifact under review: a complete first version of a defense-in-depth network security plan while every earlier competency remains active.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Net Cia Risk Terms, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a safe investigation headed "# Evidence: net-acl-filtering-lbolc2" with a concrete hypothesis, one read-only network command, and an observation that changes the next decision.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Net Acl Filtering into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: net-acl-filtering-lbolc2
# hypothesis: [replace with one falsifiable probable cause]
# command: choose one safe read-only simulator command
# observation: [replace with the result that supports or rejects the hypothesis]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Net Acl Filtering evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Net Acl Filtering assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Design ordered ACL, URL, and content filtering rules with least privilege, state, direction, logging, and exception review. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: network security. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Net Acl Filtering, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a complete first version of a defense-in-depth network security plan while every earlier competency remains active.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: An ACL automatically evaluates the most specific rule before earlier rules. This fails the Net Acl Filtering contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Internet Protocol Version 6 Specification (RFC 8200) — Controls IPv6 packet, addressing, extension, and transition explanations at foundational depth.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design ordered ACL, URL, and content filtering rules with least privilege, state, direction, logging, and exception review.

hints: Name the Net Acl Filtering precondition or invariant that the debug case must preserve.
Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed debug case derived from this module: network security. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: An ACL automatically evaluates the most specific rule before earlier rules.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Net Acl Filtering applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Design ordered ACL, URL, and content filtering rules with least privilege, state, direction, logging, and exception review.

hints: Name the Net Acl Filtering precondition or invariant that the debug case must preserve.
Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed debug case derived from this module: network security. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: An ACL automatically evaluates the most specific rule before earlier rules.
